title: [Compatibility] Blooming Biosphere & Tectonic
description: Adds compatibility between Blooming Biosphere and Tectonic v3
body:
Adds compatibility between Blooming Biosphere and Tectonic v3 by uniting their noise settings files.

# ‼️ Notes ‼️
- Only for Tectonic v3!
- Make sure the Compatibility pack is **placed above** blooming biosphere and tectonic in your pack order! *(Mod version doesn't require pack order changes as that is handled automatically there)*
